positive: A stylized, highly contrasting graphic illustration featuring a geometric celestial theme: a stylized crescent moon embracing a group of abstract, geometrically arranged stars and constellations. The overall design should be symmetrical and centrally composed, utilizing strong linework and solid color blocking. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep midnight blue, bright cosmic gold, and crisp matte white. The style should be clean, modern vector art mixed with Art Deco influences, suitable for a t-shirt print. High contrast, crisp edges, minimalist yet detailed.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, busy, realistic, messy, cartoon, graffiti, complex background, multiple subjects, illegible, noisy
